scripts.dev:stage3: concurrently -n issuer,analyzer,policy,frontend "pnpm --filter @web3id/issuer-service dev" "pnpm --filter @web3id/analyzer-service dev" "pnpm --filter @web3id/policy-api dev" "pnpm --filter @web3id/frontend dev"
scripts.test:integration: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/integration/basic-service-integration.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/integration/extended-service-integration.test.ts
scripts.test:system: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/core-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/boundary-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/scenario-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/reserved-safety-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm test:system:multichain && pnpm test:system:mainstream:smoke
scripts.test:system:smoke: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/core-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/reserved-safety-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm test:system:mainstream:smoke
scripts.test:system:multichain: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/multi-chain-root-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/subject-aggregate-binding-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/aggregate-proof-policy-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/aggregate-audit-acceptance.test.ts
scripts.test:system:mainstream:smoke: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/tron-controller-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/ton-controller-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/cosmos-controller-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/aptos-controller-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/sui-controller-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/mainstream-chains-aggregate-acceptance.test.ts
scripts.test:system:mainstream: pnpm test:system:mainstream:smoke && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/mainstream-chains-full-acceptance.test.ts
scripts.test:phase4:smoke: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/recovery-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/cross-domain-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/privacy-mode-acceptance.test.ts
scripts.test:phase4: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/recovery-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/cross-domain-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/privacy-mode-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/version-replay-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/governance-control-acceptance.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/system/reliability-acceptance.test.ts
